studio.name: Royalty Dance Company
studio.pageTitle: Royalty Dance Company Website Template Options
studio.description: Royalty Dance Company website template options prepared for review.
studio.heading: Royalty Dance Company website template options.
studio.intro: Open any homepage direction to review the layout, design language, and parent journey. Each option carries the same content and faculty across the page so the conversation can focus on the look and feel.

templates.label: Demo 1
templates.title: Premium Editorial
templates.description: An editorial luxury treatment that mirrors the royal brand metaphor. Cream paper, deep burgundy, antique gold, and large serif typography for a magazine-quality first impression.
templates.source: Claude-generated demo for new studio onboarding, 2026-05-26

templates.label: Demo 2
templates.title: Performance Cinematic
templates.description: A stage-energy direction built around the competitive side of the studio. Deep midnight navy, royal purple atmosphere, and crown gold accents with a spotlight aesthetic.
templates.source: Claude-generated demo for new studio onboarding, 2026-05-26

templates.label: Demo 3
templates.title: Community Warmth
templates.description: A family-first direction with the studio cast as a second home. Warm blush, terracotta, deep plum, soft cream, and parent voices carrying the page.
templates.source: Claude-generated demo for new studio onboarding, 2026-05-26

templates.label: Demo 4
templates.title: Program Pathways
templates.description: A hub layout organized around three clear parent decision pathways: Tiny Royals, recreational classes, and the Royal Court competition team. Soft lilac, royal purple, and warm gold.
templates.source: Claude-generated demo for new studio onboarding, 2026-05-26
